description: E2B provides isolated cloud sandboxes where AI agents and applications can execute code, run tools, and manage files and processes safely. It also offers templates and SDKs for creating and controlling those sandbox environments.
summary: E2B exposes a public docs MCP server at `https://e2b.dev/mcp`, a developer HTTP API for managing sandboxes and sandbox envd endpoints, and an `e2b` CLI installed via npm or Homebrew.

surfaces.name: E2B Platform and Sandbox HTTP API
